member.name: M:UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokenization.DictionaryTokenizer.#ctor(System.Boolean,UglyToad.PdfPig.Core.StackDepthGuard,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokens.NameToken},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a new .
member.param: Whether to read strings using the PdfDocEncoding.
Can be provided to recover from errors with missing dictionary end symbols if the set of keys expected in the dictionary are known.

member.summary: Read an .

member.name: T:UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokenization.ITokenizer
member.summary: Reads tokens from input data.

member.name: P:UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokenization.ITokenizer.ReadsNextByte
member.summary: Whether this tokenizer type reads the byte following the token itself to detect if the token has ended.

member.name: M:UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokenization.ITokenizer.TryTokenize(System.Byte,UglyToad.PdfPig.Core.IInputBytes,UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokens.IToken@)
member.summary: Try and read the token of the corresponding type from the input.
member.param: The byte read to detect this is the correct tokenizer to use.
The token of the corresponding type if read.

member.name: T:UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokenization.Scanner.CoreTokenScanner
member.summary: The default for reading PostScript/PDF style data.

member.name: P:UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokenization.Scanner.CoreTokenScanner.CurrentTokenStart
member.summary: The offset in the input data at which the starts.

member.name: F:UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokenization.Scanner.CoreTokenScanner.isStream
member.summary: '%' only identifies comments outside of PDF streams and strings, inside these we should ignore it.
member.remarks: PDFBox skips all of a line following a comment character inside streams, see: https://github.com/apache/pdfbox/blob/0e1c42dace1c3a2631d5309f662de5628b80fda6/pdfbox/src/main/java/org/apache/pdfbox/pdfparser/BaseParser.java#L1319

member.summary: Create a new from the input.

member.name: M:UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokenization.Scanner.CoreTokenScanner.RecoverFromIncorrectEndImage(System.Int64)
member.summary: Handles the situation where "EI" was encountered in the inline image data but was not the end of the image.
member.param: The offset of the "E" of the "EI" marker which was incorrectly read.
member.returns: The set of bytes from the incorrect "EI" to the correct "EI" including the incorrect "EI".

member.name: T:UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokenization.Scanner.ISeekableTokenScanner
member.summary: A that supports seeking in the underlying input data.

member.name: M:UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokenization.Scanner.ISeekableTokenScanner.Seek(System.Int64)
member.summary: Move to the specified position.

member.name: P:UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokenization.Scanner.ISeekableTokenScanner.CurrentPosition
member.summary: The current position in the input.

member.name: P:UglyToad.PdfPig.Tokenization.Scanner.ISeekableTokenScanner.Length
member.summary: The length of the data represented by this scanner.

member.summary: Add support for a custom type of tokenizer.

member.summary: Remove support for a custom type of tokenizer added with .

member.summary: Resize the internal buffer either by doubling current buffer size or by adding to whichever is greater.
member.param: Number of chars requested beyond current position.
